tools.name: asps.directoryAspsDelete

tools.description: Gets information about an ASP issued by a user.

tools.name: asps.directoryAspsList

tools.name: channels.adminChannelsStop
tools.description: Stops watching resources through this channel.

tools.name: chromeosdevices.directoryChromeosdevicesAction
tools.description: Takes an action that affects a Chrome OS Device. This includes deprovisioning, disabling, and re-enabling devices. *Warning:* * Deprovisioning a device will stop device policy syncing and remove device-level printers. After a device is deprovisioned, it must be wiped before it can be re-enrolled. * Lost or stolen devices should use the disable action. * Re-enabling a disabled device will consume a device license. If you do not have sufficient licenses available when completing the re-enable action, you will receive an error. For more information about deprovisioning and disabling devices, visit the [help center](https://support.google.com/chrome/a/answer/3523633).

tools.name: chromeosdevices.directoryChromeosdevicesGet
tools.description: Retrieves a Chrome OS device's properties.

tools.name: chromeosdevices.directoryChromeosdevicesList
tools.description: Retrieves a paginated list of Chrome OS devices within an account.

tools.name: chromeosdevices.directoryChromeosdevicesMoveDevicesToOu
tools.description: Moves or inserts multiple Chrome OS devices to an organizational unit. You can move up to 50 devices at once.

tools.name: chromeosdevices.directoryChromeosdevicesPatch
tools.description: Updates a device's updatable properties, such as `annotatedUser`, `annotatedLocation`, `notes`, `orgUnitPath`, or `annotatedAssetId`. This method supports [patch semantics](/admin-sdk/directory/v1/guides/performance#patch).

tools.name: chromeosdevices.directoryChromeosdevicesUpdate
tools.description: Updates a device's updatable properties, such as `annotatedUser`, `annotatedLocation`, `notes`, `orgUnitPath`, or `annotatedAssetId`.

tools.name: customer.adminCustomerDevicesChromeosCommandsGet
tools.description: Gets command data a specific command issued to the device.

tools.name: customer.adminCustomerDevicesChromeosIssueCommand
tools.description: Issues a command for the device to execute.

tools.name: customers.adminCustomersChromePrintersList
tools.description: List printers configs.

tools.name: customers.adminCustomersChromePrintersListPrinterModels

tools.description: Lists print server configurations.

tools.name: customers.adminCustomersChromePrintServersPatch
tools.description: Updates a print server's configuration.

tools.description: Retrieves all groups of a domain or of a user given a userKey (paginated).

tools.name: groups.directoryGroupsPatch
tools.description: Updates a group's properties. This method supports [patch semantics](/admin-sdk/directory/v1/guides/performance#patch).

tools.name: members.directoryMembersDelete
tools.description: Removes a member from a group.

tools.name: members.directoryMembersGet
tools.description: Retrieves a group member's properties.

tools.name: members.directoryMembersHasMember
tools.description: Checks whether the given user is a member of the group. Membership can be direct or nested, but if nested, the `memberKey` and `groupKey` must be entities in the same domain or an `Invalid input` error is returned. To check for nested memberships that include entities outside of the group's domain, use the [`checkTransitiveMembership()`](https://cloud.google.com/identity/docs/reference/rest/v1/groups.memberships/checkTransitiveMembership) method in the Cloud Identity Groups API.

tools.name: members.directoryMembersInsert
tools.description: Adds a user to the specified group.

tools.name: members.directoryMembersList
tools.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all members in a group. This method times out after 60 minutes. For more information, see [Troubleshoot error codes](https://developers.google.com/admin-sdk/directory/v1/guides/troubleshoot-error-codes).

tools.name: members.directoryMembersPatch
tools.description: Updates the membership properties of a user in the specified group. This method supports [patch semantics](/admin-sdk/directory/v1/guides/performance#patch).

tools.name: members.directoryMembersUpdate
tools.description: Updates the membership of a user in the specified group.

tools.name: mobiledevices.directoryMobiledevicesAction
tools.description: Takes an action that affects a mobile device. For example, remotely wiping a device.

tools.name: mobiledevices.directoryMobiledevicesDelete
tools.description: Removes a mobile device.

tools.name: mobiledevices.directoryMobiledevicesGet
tools.description: Retrieves a mobile device's properties.

tools.name: mobiledevices.directoryMobiledevicesList
tools.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all user-owned mobile devices for an account. To retrieve a list that includes company-owned devices, use the Cloud Identity [Devices API](https://cloud.google.com/identity/docs/concepts/overview-devices) instead. This method times out after 60 minutes. For more information, see [Troubleshoot error codes](https://developers.google.com/admin-sdk/directory/v1/guides/troubleshoot-error-codes).

tools.name: users.directoryUsersMakeAdmin
tools.description: Makes a user a super administrator.

tools.name: users.directoryUsersPatch
tools.description: Updates a user using patch semantics. The update method should be used instead, because it also supports patch semantics and has better performance. If you're mapping an external identity to a Google identity, use the [`update`](https://developers.google.com/admin-sdk/directory/v1/reference/users/update) method instead of the `patch` method. This method is unable to clear fields that contain repeated objects (`addresses`, `phones`, etc). Use the update method instead.

tools.name: users.directoryUsersPhotosDelete
tools.description: Removes the user's photo.

tools.name: users.directoryUsersPhotosGet
tools.description: Retrieves the user's photo.

tools.name: users.directoryUsersPhotosPatch
tools.description: Adds a photo for the user. This method supports [patch semantics](/admin-sdk/directory/v1/guides/performance#patch).

tools.name: users.directoryUsersPhotosUpdate
tools.description: Adds a photo for the user.

tools.name: users.directoryUsersSignOut
tools.description: Signs a user out of all web and device sessions and reset their sign-in cookies. User will have to sign in by authenticating again.

tools.name: users.directoryUsersUndelete
tools.description: Undeletes a deleted user.

tools.name: users.directoryUsersUpdate
tools.description: Updates a user. This method supports patch semantics, meaning that you only need to include the fields you wish to update. Fields that are not present in the request will be preserved, and fields set to `null` will be cleared. For repeating fields that contain arrays, individual items in the array can't be patched piecemeal; they must be supplied in the request body with the desired values for all items. See the [user accounts guide](https://developers.google.com/admin-sdk/directory/v1/guides/manage-users#update_user) for more information.

tools.name: users.directoryUsersWatch
tools.description: Watches for changes in users list.

tools.name: verificationCodes.directoryVerificationCodesInvalidate
tools.description: Invalidates the current backup verification codes for the user.

tools.name: verificationCodes.directoryVerificationCodesList
tools.description: Returns the current set of valid backup verification codes for the specified user.
